item.title: About
item.description:
Father, husband, occasional musician. Professional software engineer since 2003.

I’ve worked across a wide range of domains — cloud architecture, IoT, healthcare, fintech, and open source. I enjoy solving complex problems, building reliable systems, and working with good teams.

Currently a Software Architect at CodeValue, where I lead the architecture and development of a cloud-based IoT platform.

I also created AnyStatus, an open-source project that was selected for the ThoughtWorks Technology Radar 2019 and is used by thousands of developers worldwide, including teams at Bosch and Microsoft.

item.title: Experience
item.description:
Experience Link to heading

Software Architect — CodeValue Link to heading

Jun 2018 – Present

  • Leading software architecture, design, and implementation of a cloud-based IoT solution for multiple products and projects.
  • Supervised and supported a distributed team of 10 developers across different cities and countries.
  • Built extensive integrations for a critical-asset security system, including external radar systems (ELTA).
  • Designed and developed a desktop application for Rafael.

Software Engineer — Allscripts Link to heading

Jun 2016 – Jun 2018
